ocl:
context Payment
inv: (self.loan <> null) and (self.isProcessed = true)

context Fine
inv: self.amount >= 22 and self.amount <= 99

context Library
inv: self.maxLoanDays >= 7 and self.maxLoanDays <= 61

context Book
inv: self.pages >= 32 and self.pages <= 59

context Library
inv: self.maxLoanDays >= 37 and self.maxLoanDays <= 48

context Branch
inv: self.loans->any(x | x.startDate <> '') <> null

context Loan
inv: self.dueDate <> null and self.returnDate <> null

context Reservation
inv: self.requestDate <> null implies self.expiryDate <> null

context Librarian
inv: ((self.managedBranch.library.maxLoanDays > 1) and (self.level.toLowerCase() = 'test')) and (not((self.managedBranch.library.maxLoanDays > 1) and (self.level.toLowerCase() = 'test')))

context Loan
inv: (self.startDate <> null implies self.dueDate <> null) and (not(self.startDate <> null implies self.dueDate <> null))

context Category
inv: (self.books->select(x | x.pages > 0)->size() >= 1) and (not(self.books->select(x | x.pages > 0)->size() >= 1))

context Reservation
inv: (self.requestDate <> null and self.expiryDate <> null) and (not(self.requestDate <> null and self.expiryDate <> null))

context Loan
inv: ((self.startDate <> null) = (self.returnDate <> null)) and (not((self.startDate <> null) = (self.returnDate <> null)))

context Category
inv: (self.books->exists(x | x.publishYear <= 10)) and (not(self.books->exists(x | x.publishYear <= 10)))

context Loan
inv: (self.copy <> null) and (not(self.copy <> null))

context Loan
inv: (self.branch <> null) and (not(self.branch <> null))

context Category
inv: (self.books->forAll(x | x.publishYear >= 10)) and (not(self.books->forAll(x | x.publishYear >= 10)))

context Fine
inv: (self.payments->collect(x | x.amount)->sum() >= 6) and (not(self.payments->collect(x | x.amount)->sum() >= 6))

context Librarian
inv: ((self.managedBranch <> null) and (self.level.size() = 27)) and (not((self.managedBranch <> null) and (self.level.size() = 27)))
